title.ko: 서브클라스 B29B, B29C 또는 B29D에 관련되는 성형재, 보강재, 충진재 또는 미리 성형된 부품, 예 삽입물에 관한 인덱싱 계열
title.en: INDEXING SCHEME ASSOCIATED WITH SUBCLASSES B29B, B29C OR B29D, RELATING TO MOULDING MATERIALS OR TO MATERIALS FOR REINFORCEMENTS, FILLERS OR PREFORMED PARTS, e.g. INSERTS

definition.ko: 성형재용 조성물;성형된 물질의 조건, 형태 또는 상태 B29K1/00- 105/00 보강재용 조성물 B29K201/00- 311/00 충진재용 조성물 B29K401/00- 511/00 미리 성형된 부품(예비 성형품)의 조성물 B29K601/00- 711/00

title.en: Compositions for moulding materials; Condition, form or state of moulded material
Use of cellulose, modified cellulose or cellulose derivatives, e.g. viscose, as moulding material
Use of natural rubber as moulding material
Use of rubber derived from conjugated dienes, as moulding material

title.ko: 성형재로 메인 그룹 B29K 7/00 ~ B29K 9/00중의 단일에 속하지 아니하는 고무의 사용
title.en: Use of rubber not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0007000000-B29K0009000000, as moulding material
Use of unspecified rubbers as moulding material
Use of polyalkenes as moulding material
Use of polymers of vinyl-aromatic compounds as moulding material
Use of polyvinylhalogenides as moulding material
Use of polyvinylalcohols, polyvinylethers, polyvinylaldehydes, polyvinylketones or polyvinylketals as moulding material
Use of polyvinylesters as moulding material

title.ko: 성형재로 불포화산의 중합체 또는 그것으로부터 유도된 중합체의 사용 (B29K 35/00이 우선)
title.en: Use of polymers of unsaturated acids or derivatives thereof, as moulding material  (B29K0035000000 takes precedence)
Use of polymers of unsaturated polycarboxylic acids as moulding material
Use of polymers of unsaturated cyclic compounds having no unsaturated aliphatic groups in a side-chain, e.g. coumarone-indene resins, as moulding material

title.ko: 성형재로 메인 그룹 B29K 23/00 ~ B29K 45/00중의 단일에 속하지 아니하고 단지 탄소－탄소의 불포화 결합이 수반하는 중합 반응에 의하여 얻어 지는 특정한 중합체의 사용
title.en: Use of specific polymers obtained by polymerisation reactions only involving carbon-to-carbon unsaturated bonds, not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0023000000-B29K0045000000, as moulding material
Use of polyacetals as moulding material
Use of condensation polymers of aldehydes or ketones, as moulding material
Use of epoxy resins as moulding material
Use of polyesters as moulding material
Use of polycarbonates as moulding material
Use of polyethers as moulding material
Use of other polymers having oxygen as the only hetero atom in the main chain, as moulding material
Use of polyureas or polyurethanes as moulding material
Use of polyamides, e.g. polyesteramides, as moulding material
Use of other polymers having nitrogen, with or without oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as moulding material
Use of polymers having sulfur, with or without nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as moulding material
Use of polymers having silicon, with or without sulfur, nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as moulding material
Use of polymers having elements other than silicon, nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as moulding material

title.ko: 성형재로 메인 그룹 B29K 59/00-B29K 85/00중의 단일에 속하지 아니하면서 중축합 또는 중부가반응에 의해서 만들은 특정한 중합체의 사용
title.en: Use of specific polymers obtained by polycondensation or polyaddition, not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0059000000-B29K0085000000, as moulding material
Use of waxes as moulding material
Use of bituminous materials as moulding material

title.ko: 성형재로 메인 그룹 B29K 1/00-B29K 95/00중에서 단일에 속하지 아니하는 특정한 고분자 물질의 사용
title.en: Use of specified macromolecular materials not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0001000000-B29K0095000000, as moulding material

title.ko: 성형재로 불특정한 고분자 화합물의 사용 (불특정한 고무의 사용 B29K 21/00))
title.en: Use of unspecified macromolecular compounds as moulding material  (use of unspecified rubbers B29K0021000000)
Use of resin-bonded materials as moulding material
Metal powders, metal carbides or the like
Mineral aggregates, e.g. sand, clay or the like
Condition, form or state of moulded material
of continuous length, e.g. cords, rovings, mats, fabrics, strands or yarns
of short lengths, e.g. chopped filaments, staple fibres or bristles
Use of cellulose, modified cellulose or cellulose derivatives, e.g. viscose, as reinforcement
Use of natural rubber as reinforcement
Use of rubber derived from conjugated dienes, as reinforcement

title.ko: 메인그룹 중 하나 또는 B29K 209/00에 포함되지 않는 고무의 보강재로의 사용
title.en: Use of rubber not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0207000000 or B29K0209000000, as reinforcement
Use of unspecified rubbers as reinforcement
Use of polymers of vinyl-aromatic compounds as reinforcement
Use of polyvinylalcohols, polyvinylethers, polyvinylaldehydes, polyvinylketones or polyvinylketals as reinforcement

title.ko: 보강재로 불포화산의 중합체 또는 그것으로부터 유도된 중합체의 사용 (B29K 235/00이 우선)
title.en: Use of polymers of unsaturated acids or derivatives thereof, as reinforcement (B29K0235000000 takes precedence)
Use of polymers of unsaturated polycarboxylic acids as reinforcement
Use of polymers of unsaturated cyclic compounds having no unsaturated aliphatic groups in a side-chain, e.g. coumarone-indene resins, as reinforcement

title.ko: 보강재로 메인 그룹 B29K 223/00 - B29K 245/00중의 단일에 속하지 아니하고 단지 탄소-탄소의 불포화 결합이 수반하는 중합 반응에 의하여 얻어지는 특정한 중합체의 사용
title.en: Use of specific polymers obtained by polymerisation reactions only involving carbon-to-carbon unsaturated bonds, not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0223000000-B29K0245000000, as reinforcement
Use of condensation polymers of aldehydes or ketones, as reinforcement
Use of epoxy resins as reinforcement
Use of other polymers having oxygen as the only hetero atom in the main chain, as reinforcement
Use of polyureas or polyurethanes as reinforcement
Use of polyamides, e.g. polyesteramides, as reinforcement
Use of other polymers having nitrogen, with or without oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as reinforcement
Use of polymers having sulfur, with or without nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as reinforcement
Use of polymers having silicon, with or without sulfur, nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as reinforcement
Use of polymers having elements other than silicon, nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as reinforcement

title.ko: 보강재로 메인 그룹 B29K 259/00-B29K 285/00중의 단일에 속하지 아니하면서 축중합 또는 중부가반응에 의하여 얻어진 특정 중합체의 사용
title.en: Use of specific polymers obtained by polycondensation or polyaddition, not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0259000000-B29K0285000000, as reinforcement
Use of bituminous materials as reinforcement

title.ko: 보강재로 메인 그룹 B29K 201/00-B29K 295/00중에서 단일에 속하지 아니하는 특정 고분자 물질의 사용
title.en: Use of specific macromolecular materials not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0201000000-B29K0295000000, as reinforcement

title.ko: 보강재로 불특정된 고분자 화합물의 사용 (불특정한 고무의 사용 B29K 221/00）
title.en: Use of unspecified macromolecular compounds as reinforcement (use of unspecified rubbers B29K0221000000)
Use of resin-bonded materials as reinforcement
Metal powders, metal carbides or the like
Mineral aggregates, e.g. sand, clay or the like
Use of metals, their alloys or their compounds, as reinforcement
Use of elements other than metals as reinforcement

title.ko: 보강재로 그룹 B29K 303/00-B29K 307/00에 포함되지 않는 무기물질의 사용
title.en: Use of inorganic materials not provided for in groups B29K0303000000-B29K0307000000, as reinforcement

title.ko: 보강재로 그룹 B29K 201/00-B29K 309/00에 포함되지 않는 천연산물 또는 그 복합물의 사용
title.en: Use of natural products or their composites, not provided for in groups B29K0201000000-B29K0309000000, as reinforcement
Use of cellulose, modified cellulose or cellulose derivatives, e.g. viscose, as filler
Use of natural rubber as filler
Use of rubber derived from conjugated dienes, as filler

title.ko: 메인그룹 중 하나 또는 B29K 409/00에 포함되지 않는 고무의 충전제(filler)로의 사용
title.en: Use of rubber not provided for in a single one of main groupsB29K0407000000 or B29K0409000000, as filler
Use of unspecified rubbers as filler
Use of polymers of vinyl-aromatic compounds as filler
Use of polyvinylalcohols, polyvinylethers, polyvinylaldehydes, polyvinylketones or polyvinylketals as filler

title.ko: 충진재로 불포화산의 중합체 또는 그 유도체의 사용 (B29K 435/00이 우선)

Use of polymers of unsaturated polycarboxylic acids as filler
Use of polymers of unsaturated cyclic compounds having no unsaturated aliphatic groups in a side-chain, e.g. coumarone-indene resins, as filler

title.ko: 충진재로 메인 그룹 B29K 423/00 - B29K 445/00중의 단일에 속하지 아니하면서 단지 탄소-탄소의 불포화 결합을 수반하는 중합 반응에 의하여 얻어지는 특정 중합체의 사용
title.en: Use of specific polymers obtained by polymerisation reactions only involving carbon-to-carbon unsaturated bonds, not provided for in a single one of main groups B29K0423000000-B29K0445000000, as filler

Use of other polymers having oxygen as the only hetero atom in the main chain, as filler

Use of polymers having elements other than silicon, nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only, in the main chain, as filler

title.ko: 충진재로 메인 그룹 B29K 459/00-B29K 485/00중의 단일에 속하지 아니하면서 축중합 또는 중부가반응에 의해서 얻어진 특정 중합체의 사용

title.ko: 충진재로 불특정된 고분자 물질의 사용 (불특정한 고무의 사용 B29K 421/00)
title.en: Use of unspecified macromolecular compounds as filler (use of unspecified rubbers B29K0421000000)
Use of resin-bonded materials as filler
Metal powders, metal carbides or the like
Mineral aggregates, e.g. sand, clay or the like
Use of metals, their alloys or their compounds, as filler
Noble metals, e.g. silver, gold or platinum
Use of elements other than metals as filler

Natural fibres, e.g. wool or cotton

Use of natural rubber for preformed parts, e.g. for inserts
Use of rubber derived from conjugated dienes, for preformed parts, e.g. for inserts

title.ko: 메인그룹 중 하나 또는 B29K 609/00에 포함되지 않는 고무의 예비 성형품, 예. 삽입물을 위한 사용

Use of polyalkenes for preformed parts, e.g. for inserts

Use of polyvinylalcohols, polyvinylethers, polyvinylaldehydes, polyvinylketones or polyvinylketals for preformed parts, e.g. for inserts
